zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean於大約1196年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親MacRath8歲，母親Marguerite Mariotte18歲。他於大約1218年與Unknown在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1281年在蘇格蘭享年87歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean于大约1196年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲MacRath8岁，母亲Marguerite Mariotte18岁。他于大约1218年与Unknown在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1281年在苏格兰享年87岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Gilleain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Gillian  .

variants.name: Gillian
meanings: Variant of   Julian  , from which it was differentiated in spelling only in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Na
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean was born about 1196, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, MacRath, was 8 and his mother, Marguerite Mariotte, was 18. He married Unknown about 1218, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1281, in Scotland, at the age of 87, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean est né environ 1196, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, MacRath, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Mariotte, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Unknown environ 1218, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1281, à Écosse, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean um 1196 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater MacRath 8 und seine Mutter Marguerite Mariotte 18. Er hat um 1218 in Argyll, Scotland Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1281 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean è nato il circa 1196 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, MacRath, aveva 8 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite Mariotte, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Unknown circa 1218, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1281, nel Scotland, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLeanが約1196年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父MacRathは8歳，母Marguerite Mariotteは18歳であった。約1218年にスコットランドアルグイルでUnknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1281年にスコットランドで87歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이
ko.lifeSummary: Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean(이)가 대략 1196년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 MacRath(은)는 8세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Mariotte(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1218년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1281년 스컷랜드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, MacRath, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Mariotte, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Unknown aproximadamente 1218, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1281, em Scotland, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean родился около 1196 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени MacRath было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Mariotte, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown около 1218 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1281 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
